title: INSERT INTO ... SELECT bypasses foreign key constraint checks
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount DOUBLE, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO orders (id, user_id, amount) VALUES (1, 2, 100.00);
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO ... SELECT bypasses foreign key constraints
